import axios from'axios';const API_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'http://localhost:8000';export const sendMessage=async(message,token)=>{try{const response=await axios.post("".concat(API_URL,"/chat"),{message},{headers:{Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token||'')// Include token if provided
}});return response.data;}catch(error){console.error('Error sending message:',error.response?error.response.data:error.message);throw error.response?error.response.data:new Error('Network error');}};
